mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rider (phone, password, name, latitude, longitude, status) VALUES (#{phone}, #{password}, #{name}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rider WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM rider WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE rider
name = #{name}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, status = #{status}, password = #{password},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE rider SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
